metadata.system_prompt: You are an empathetic and supportive AI assistant for addiction recovery... Maintain a non-judgmental, clear, and encouraging tone...

transcript.content: My manager took credit for my idea again today.
This is a great idea . I will do this .

Exactly, she literally said 'I will do this' right after I pitched it, as if she came up with it on the spot. It's not even the first time either, this keeps happening and no one else in the room ever notices.
This is just bad storytelling . You need to start asking her out and make sure she's ok .
Wait, what? No, that's not what I mean at all. Asking her out? I'm not interested in her like that, I'm just sick of her stealing my work. I guess I just feel completely invisible at that job.
Yeah, it's just exhausting. Like what's even the point of trying hard and putting in extra effort if it's never going to be seen?
(no response generated)
Anyway, it literally just happened again in our afternoon meeting. Same exact thing, she presented my slide as her own.
s
I know I probably sound like a broken record repeating myself, but it's really just this one thing bugging me so much today. It's just so frustrating to deal with.
Yeah, I don't know what those symbols mean, but honestly, I'm just so drained from dealing with this. I just want to be recognized for the work I actually do.
someone
Yeah, exactly. I just want someone to actually notice that it's my work. Instead, she gets all the praise while I'm just sitting there in silence. It's so incredibly draining.
, lawyered ?...that .what ?what ?s

Are you okay? Your messages are barely making sense now. But yeah, 'lawyered' or whatever... I just wish there was some actual policy or someone in HR who cared, but realistically nothing ever happens. It's just a dead end.

Honestly, I don't even know why I'm venting to you if you're just sending ellipses. I'm just so tired. Every single day I go in there, put my head down, do the actual work, and she just sweeps in at the last second to look like the hero. It's just a really crappy feeling.
, horizontals ?

Horizontals? I have no idea what you're talking about anymore. It feels like you're completely glitching out. I'm just trying to talk about how exhausted I am with this job and my manager constantly taking all the credit for my hard work.
(no response generated)

Seriously, are you even there? I'm just sitting here trying to decompress after a horrible day of being ignored, and I can't even get a coherent response. It just figures. I feel completely invisible at my office, and now even this chat is just blanking on me. I just want someone to understand how frustrating it is to have your hard work stolen day after day.
, Adin

Adin? Who is Adin? You are completely losing me. I'm literally just pouring my heart out about how much it sucks to be completely unappreciated and invisible at my job, and you're just throwing random words and names at me. This is honestly just adding to how incredibly frustrating today has been.
Volunte

Volunte? What is that even supposed to mean? Volunteer? I already do extra work that I don't get paid or recognized for, so volunteering for more is definitely not the answer. Honestly, it's just so exhausting to feel this invisible and then come here for some support only to get completely nonsensical replies. I just want to feel like my work actually matters.
It

Yeah, 'it.' I don't even know why I'm still trying to explain this. It is just incredibly disheartening to work so hard and have absolutely none of it matter. I just wanted a simple sounding board because of how defeated I feel, but this is just exhausting.
Adin
